shortDescription: UKVI · Skilled Worker · CoS from licensed sponsor · 70 points

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Skilled Worker visa fee (£719+ for 3 years) and IHS on gov.uk. Salary must meet going rate for SOC code.

alert.title: 70-point requirement
alert.body: Applicant needs 70 points: job offer from licensed sponsor, skill level, English, and salary threshold. Missing any element fails eligibility.

about.label: Description
about.value: Work visa for skilled job offer from UK employer with valid sponsor licence. Requires Certificate of Sponsorship (CoS) and meeting 70-point criteria including salary threshold.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Job offer from licensed sponsor · CoS reference · RQF Level 3+ skilled occupation · English B1 · Salary at going rate or minimum threshold

about.label: Salary threshold
about.value: General threshold £38,700 (2024+) or occupation-specific going rate—whichever is higher. Verify current rules for 2026.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Work for sponsoring employer; visa tied to CoS. Pathway to ILR after 5 years typically.

eligibility.criterion: Certificate of Sponsorship from licensed sponsor
Job at RQF Level 3+ (eligible SOC code)

redFlagsBanner: If refused on salary or SOC code, verify going rate on gov.uk before resubmitting with corrected CoS.

redFlags.title: Salary below going rate
redFlags.description: Offered salary below SOC-specific or general threshold.
redFlags.fix: Verify going rate for SOC code; negotiate salary with employer

redFlags.title: Unlicensed or suspended sponsor
redFlags.description: Employer sponsor licence expired or revoked.
redFlags.fix: Check sponsor register before CoS assignment

redFlags.title: Wrong SOC code
redFlags.description: Job duties do not match assigned SOC code.
redFlags.fix: Align SOC with actual role; detailed job description

redFlags.title: CoS errors
redFlags.description: Incorrect details on CoS vs application.
redFlags.fix: Cross-check CoS against passport and offer letter

redFlags.title: TB test issues
redFlags.description: Missing or expired TB certificate for India.
redFlags.fix: Approved clinic TB test valid 6 months

faqs.q: Can we guarantee Skilled Worker visa?
faqs.a: No. UKVI verifies sponsor, salary, and points. Never promise approval.
Certificate of Sponsorship—electronic record from licensed employer assigning sponsorship.
Verify current general threshold and going rates on gov.uk—rules updated in 2024.
New CoS and application generally required for new employer.
Partner dependants typically can work—verify dependant visa conditions.
Generally 5 years on Skilled Worker route—verify current ILR requirements.
IHS payable for visa duration—use gov.uk calculator.
Yes, entry clearance from outside UK with CoS and job offer.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Verify sponsor on register before client fees
Check going rate for SOC code on gov.uk
TB test at approved clinic early
postApproval: Send visa vignette and work conditions
Guide on NI number and HMRC

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Always verify sponsor licence status on register—expired licence invalidates CoS.

quiz.question: Skilled Worker requires how many points:
quiz.explanation: 70-point system.

quiz.question: CoS issued by:
options: Any company
Licensed UK sponsor only
University only
Embassy
quiz.explanation: Sponsor licence required.

quiz.question: Salary must meet:
options: No minimum
General threshold or going rate (whichever higher)
£1 only
Employer choice only
quiz.explanation: Salary compliance critical.

quiz.question: Indian applicants need TB test:
options: Never
Yes from approved clinic
Only if sick
US clinic only
quiz.explanation: TB test required for India.

quiz.question: Counselors must never:
options: Verify sponsor
Guarantee visa approval
Check going rate
Review CoS
quiz.explanation: No guarantees.
